record.field:
interview = False Interview = env['x_hr.applicant_mcep_interview'].sudo() Question = env['x_mcep.interview_question'].sudo()
for rec in records: allowed = env.user.has_group('base.group_system') or env.user.has_group('hr_recruitment.group_hr_recruitment_manager') if not allowed: allowed = env.user.id in rec.interviewer_ids.ids if not allowed: raise Warning('Only selected interviewers or HR administrators can conduct this interview.') if not Question.search_count([('x_active', '=', True)]): raise Warning('Seed the MCEP interview questions before conducting interviews.')
line_commands = [] questions = Question.search([('x_active', '=', True)], order='x_sequence asc, id asc') for question in questions: line_commands.append((0, 0, { 'x_sequence': question.x_sequence or 0, 'x_question_id': question.id, 'x_question_label_ar': question.x_label_ar or question.with_context(lang='ar_001').x_name or question.x_name, 'x_question_label_en': question.x_label_en or question.with_context(lang='en_US').x_name or question.x_name, 'x_max_score': question.x_default_max_score or 5, 'x_actual_score': 0, }))
interview = Interview.create({ 'x_applicant_id': rec.id, 'x_interviewer_user_id': env.user.id, 'x_interview_datetime': datetime.datetime.now(), 'x_full_name_snapshot': rec.partner_name or False, 'x_gender_snapshot': rec.x_gender or False, 'x_national_id_snapshot': rec.x_national_id or False, 'x_position_applied_snapshot': rec.job_id.with_context(lang='ar_001').name if rec.job_id else False, 'x_line_ids': line_commands, }) rec.message_post(body='Interview evaluation record created for the selected interviewer.')
if len(records) == 1 and interview: action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'name': 'Conduct Interview', 'res_model': 'x_hr.applicant_mcep_interview', 'view_mode': 'form', 'res_id': interview.id, 'view_id': env.ref('hr_recruitment_custom.view_mcep_interview_form').id, 'target': 'current', }
